network_summary: Syed Rehman DDS is confirmed President/owner of MIRUS ORAL HEALTH & ESTHETIC LLC (DBA Cornerstone Dentistry) in Roselle and appears as authorized official on DENTAL CARE CENTER JUSTICE LLC in Justice — two separate personally-owned GP locations constituting a small dentist-owned multi-office private group. The third AO cluster member, DENTAL 360 BERWYN LLC, is part of the separately-managed Dental 360 DSO brand (19 IL locations, corporate HQ 3435 W Irving Park Rd Chicago); Rehman's AO role there is an administrative/signing-officer artifact, not ownership of the Dental 360 network — this is a false-positive linkage. No MSO, management-services entity, PE backer, or DSO platform was found tying the two Rehman-owned locations together beyond his personal ownership.

stale_closed_false_positive_notes: DENTAL 360 BERWYN LLC (location_id 3e7a3d11d88cb223) is a false-positive in this AO cluster: it belongs to the Dental 360 branded DSO (dental360grp.com, 19 IL locations, central management at 3435 W Irving Park Rd Chicago), not to Syed Rehman's personal ownership group. Rehman appears as AO on the LLC filing — likely as a signing dentist or credentialing contact for that entity — but does not own or operate the Dental 360 brand. This location's existing dso_regional classification should be retained and it should NOT be counted as part of Rehman's dentist_multi network.
evidence_chain: AO signal: SYED REHMAN appears as authorized_official on 3 IL GP NPIs across ZIPs 60172, 60402, 60458. Documentary corroboration: (1) npino.com for NPI 1033518154 confirms Syed Rehman title=President/owner for MIRUS ORAL HEALTH & ESTHETIC LLC (Cornerstone Dentistry), 1530 Lake St Roselle — direct ownership documented. (2) NPI 1578160990 (DENTAL CARE CENTER JUSTICE LLC, Justice) lists Syed Rehman as authorized official; justicedentalcenter.com confirms operation at 8021 W 79th St Justice IL with no discernible separate management entity — consistent with personal ownership. (3) NPI 1447801741 (DENTAL 360 BERWYN LLC): dental360grp.com confirms Dental 360 is a branded DSO with 19 IL locations and a central corporate HQ in Chicago — this entity's AO listing of Rehman is an LLC-signing artifact, not evidence he owns or manages the Dental 360 brand. No MSO, management company, or PE backer found for any Rehman-owned entity.
future_app_notes: To fully confirm dentist_multi for Mirus+Justice: Illinois Secretary of State business filings for MIRUS ORAL HEALTH & ESTHETIC LLC and DENTAL CARE CENTER JUSTICE LLC would show registered agent / organizer — if same (Syed Rehman or a shared attorney/agent), that is strong corroboration. A single-page website for Justice Dental Center (justicedentalcenter.com) exists but lists no dentist name — contacting to confirm Rehman is the owner would close the loop. Watch whether Dental 360 Berwyn's AO changes in future NPPES updates (would resolve whether Rehman was a founding/credentialing contact who has since departed). No PE/MSO search needed for the Rehman-personal group unless future filings reveal a management company.
